test_name: Ensure Proper Functionality of External API Links
description: This scenario tests the functionality and accessibility of external links provided in the API documentation page.
steps: Navigate to the API documentation page at 'https://dev.roost.ai/docs/api'.
Identify the external link to Swagger API documentation.
Click on the external link to verify it opens in a new tab.
Ensure the new tab loads the Swagger API documentation page correctly.
Check that the link provides the correct and expected content.
Verify the presence of a return link to the original documentation page.
Close the tab and return to the API documentation page.
Check that the original page state is maintained after returning.
expected_results: External links open in a new tab and load the intended content.
Users can navigate back to the original page without loss of state.
edge_cases: External link is broken or leads to an error page.
New tab fails to load the Swagger documentation.
User is unable to return to the original page easily.
Content of the external page does not match expectations.
Browser settings prevent opening links in a new tab.
data_requirements: Stable internet connection for loading external pages.
Browser settings that allow opening links in new tabs.
Access rights to external documentation pages.
dependencies: External links must be correctly configured.
External documentation pages must be accessible.
api_interactions: Monitor any redirect or API calls triggered by clicking the link.
performance_metrics: Measure time taken to load external pages.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure external pages also meet basic accessibility standards.
